+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",

+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "falco: ROADMAP: Build slim and full Falco container images",
+    "description": "ROADMAP: Build slim and full Falco container images. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current falco deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your falco version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n falco -l app.kubernetes.io/name=falco\nhelm list -n falco 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working falco installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review falco configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant falco configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n falco -l app.kubernetes.io/name=falco\nkubectl get configmap -n falco -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=falco\n```\nThe current Falco images are quite large (720 MB) and carry lots of build tools that we want to remove from the current image. The build tools are required to compile kernel modules dynamically when the Falco container starts."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for ROADMAP: Build slim and full Falco container images",
+        "description": "The current Falco images are quite large (720 MB) and carry lots of build tools that we want to remove from the current image. The build tools are required to compile kernel modules dynamically when the Falco container starts. \n\nUnder the new design we wish to remove the build tools and create two image categories:\r\r\r\r\r\r\r\r\n\nOther tasks before this PR is complete:\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n falco -l app.kubernetes.io/name=falco\nkubectl get events -n falco --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"ROADMAP: Build slim and full Falco container images\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The current Falco images are quite large (720 MB) and carry lots of build tools that we want to remove from the current image. The build tools are required to compile kernel modules dynamically when the Falco container starts. \n\nUnder the new design we wish to remove the build tools and create two image categories:\r\r\r\r\r\r\r\r\n\nOther tasks before this PR is complete:",

+    }
